do: Use for inline, non-blocking messages; pass onClose to render the dismiss affordance and action for an action button.
dont: Don't use Alert for transient notifications — use sonner (toast).
Don't use Alert to block the flow — use alert-dialog.

boundaries: The kind prop is named type (neutral | error | success | informational | warning) — NOT variant; this is a deliberate shadcn divergence.

whenToUseInstead.when: the user must respond before continuing
